markdown.markdown:
::: {.columns} ::: {.column width="60%"} I am a third-year **Statistics and Data Science major at UCLA**, with a minor in **Global Health**, originally from San Diego, California. My academic interests include **data science, statistical modeling, and applied analytics**, particularly where data can help inform decision-making and improve real-world systems. At UCLA, I am involved in **Data Science Union**, where I collaborate with peers on data-driven projects, and **180 Degrees Consulting**, where we work with organizations to address operational and strategic challenges through analytical frameworks. I previously interned at **Warner Music Group**, first as a Finance Intern and later as a Data Science Intern within Warner Chappell Music. In these roles, I worked with the Global Digital Finance team on forecasting initiatives and internal analytics tools used to analyze digital music performance. I am also involved in **research at UCLA in a causal inference lab under Professor Falco Bargagli-Stoffi**, studying statistical methods for causal analysis in complex datasets. Outside of academics and work, I enjoy **music, hiking, being in nature, and dancing**. ::: ::: {.column width="40%"} ![](images/image_2.JPG) ![](images/image_1.JPG) ::: ::: --- ## Selected Projects Below are a few projects I have worked on during my time at UCLA. - **H-1B Visa Labor Market Analysis** - **Predictive Modeling with LASSO & Ridge Regression (Kaggle Competition)** - **Goodreads Review Rating Prediction using NLP** [View All Projects →](projects.qmd) --- ## Coursework Below are selected courses I have completed as part of the **Statistics and Data Science major at UCLA**. ### Probability & Mathematical Statistics
STATS 100A — Introduction to Probability - Probability distributions and random variables - Expectation and vector-valued random variables - Foundations of probabilistic modeling
STATS 100B — Introduction to Mathematical Statistics - Estimation and hypothesis testing - Sampling distributions - One- and two-sample inference problems
--- ### Statistical Modeling & Data Analysis
STATS 100C — Linear Models - Linear regression and matrix-based modeling - Model fitting and inference procedures - Residual analysis and model diagnostics - Principal component regression and model selection
STATS 101A — Introduction to Data Analysis and Regression - Multiple regression and generalized linear models - Logistic regression - Regression diagnostics and graphical methods - Bootstrapping and statistical influence
--- ### Computational Statistics & Data Science
STATS 102A — Computational Statistics - Numerical methods for statistical problems - Simulation and randomization tests - Bootstrapping techniques - Statistical computing and programming
COM SCI 31 — Introduction to Computer Science I - Fundamental programming concepts using C++ - Control structures, functions, arrays, and strings - Recursion and pointers - Introduction to object-oriented programming
COM SCI 32 — Introduction to Computer Science II - Object-oriented software development and program design - Abstract data types and data abstraction - Data structures including stacks, queues, and lists - Algorithm analysis and efficiency

My academic interests include **data science, statistical modeling, and applied analytics**, particularly where data can help inform decision-making and improve real-world systems. I am also involved in **research at UCLA in a causal inference lab under Professor Falco Bargagli-Stoffi**, studying statistical methods for causal analysis in complex datasets.
